Package com.shaft.listeners.internal

package com.shaft.listeners.internal
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    com.shaft.listeners
     
  • Class
    Description
    ConfigurationHelper
    TestNG listener helper that provides @BeforeTest / @AfterTest lifecycle hooks for attaching SHAFT property files and generating end-of-suite reports.
    CucumberHelper
    Internal helper class providing shared setup and teardown logic for Cucumber-based test runs managed by the SHAFT framework.
    ExecutionCountsTracker
    Tracks deduplicated execution counts by stable test id across runner adapters.
    ExecutionCountsTracker.Counts
    Deduplicated execution count snapshot.
    ExecutionFailureContext
    Shares per-thread execution failure context between runner adapters and Allure lifecycle hooks.
    ExecutionLifecycleHelper
    Shared execution lifecycle behavior used by SHAFT runner adapters.
    JiraHelper
     
    JunitListenerHelper
    Holds JUnit listener helper state and report-logging utilities per test thread.
    RetryAnalyzer
    TestNG retry analyzer that re-runs failed tests up to a configurable maximum number of attempts.
    TestExecutionInfo
    Runner-neutral test execution metadata used by SHAFT listeners.
    TestNGListenerHelper
    Provides TestNG lifecycle helper operations for logging, artifact attachment, and suite shaping.
    UpdateChecker
    Checks GitHub for the latest published SHAFT Engine version.
    WebDriverListener
